The '''Entana Run''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that was used to travel through the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]], located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. This route and the [[Burna Trade Route]] were used to mark the boundary of [[Urce sector/Legends|Urce Space]].

[[High Inquisitor]] [[Mox Slosin]] patrolled through this route, looking for Rebel agents in his area.
